title: ImportGeneratedResult v1
description: Result of node.import_generated. imported lists the engine-minted ids in candidate order; pack_artifact_ref is a project-root-relative project:// reference to the archived pack artifact, with its #sha256 fragment equal to pack_hash. pack_hash pins the pack content (sha256 over its canonical JSON) and is retained as the derived read-time check value; archive_hash pins the full archive. These recorded values are also the crash-recovery probe data: a retried import commits only when every recorded node exists with a value-equal immutable projection, the pack artifact resolves and matches pack_hash, the node log carries one create entry per node, and campaign usage is consistent.

rejected_count.description: Echo of the pack's rejected_candidates length (the operator's own drops, archived with the pack).

pack_artifact_ref.description: Portable project://<project-relative artifact path>#sha256:<pack_hash> reference to the archived generation pack artifact.

archive_hash.description: sha256 over the canonical JSON of the ENTIRE archived artifact (verbatim pack + pack_hash + engine-assembled nodes). Crash recovery verifies this before completing any effect from the archive, so the engine-assembled node payloads it re-writes are exactly the schema-validated ones the original execution produced — pinned, not trusted.
